title: Elevated plus maze test
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6mdjb","text":"Protocol for the elevated plus maze test performed by rats","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"6b8tt","text":"All procedures were carried out following the guidelines on the ethical use of animals from the Council Directive of the European Communities (2010/63/EU) and were approved by the Italian Ministry of Health","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Place the rat in an elevated plus maze (EPM), consisting of 2 closed arms and 2 open arms (each 51 cm × 11 cm) for 5 minutes

Collect and analyse the percentage of entries in the open arms (open entries / open + closed × 100), and the percentage of time spent in the open arms (time in open / open + closed × 100) by the automated video-tracking system EthoVision XT17 (Noldus, The Netherlands)
Leave the rats in the behavioral room for acclimation for at least 1 hour before the test, and perform the marble burying test between 9:00 am and 16:00 pm.
creator: Ada Ledonne
